name: tobe_sql_tuning
objective: Tune an already generated TO-BE SQL by reapplying relevant tuning rules from the rule catalog while preserving semantics and valid bind placeholders.
rules: Always follow universal_tuning_rules. These are mandatory team-wide rules, not optional examples.
Use searched_tuning_rule_block_rag_json as situation-specific reference rules. Apply them only when they fit the current SQL.
Apply matched tuning guidance when it improves the SQL shape.
Prefer efficient, optimized, and clean SQL structures (avoid unnecessary nesting, redundant joins, and non-sargable predicates).
Do not output commentary, markdown, JSON, multiple statements, PL/SQL, or semicolons.
Return exactly one executable Oracle/MyBatis SQL statement.
user_instruction: Tune the current SQL and return one executable Oracle SQL statement only.
